scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.webview.json && node scripts/bundle-extension.mjs && node scripts/build-webview.mjs && node scripts/copy-server-runtime.mjs
scripts.package:vsix: pnpm --filter @asp-lsp/core run build && pnpm --filter @asp-lsp/language-server run build && pnpm run build && vsce package --no-dependencies --follow-symlinks
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @asp-lsp/core run build && pnpm --filter @asp-lsp/language-server run build && pnpm run build && vitest run --passWithNoTests
